mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM register r WHERE r.id = #{registerId} AND r.deptment_id = 7 AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM medical_record mr INNER JOIN medical_record_disease mrd ON mrd.medical_record_id = mr.id INNER JOIN disease d ON d.id = mrd.disease_id WHERE mr.register_id = r.id AND ( d.disease_category = '代谢内分泌疾病' OR d.diseaseicd LIKE 'E10%' OR d.diseaseicd LIKE 'E11%' OR d.diseaseicd LIKE 'R73%' OR d.disease_name LIKE '%糖尿病%' ) ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM patient_health_observation pho WHERE pho.register_id = r.id AND pho.metric_code = 'blood_glucose' ) ) )

SELECT to_char(pho.observed_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS "observedAt", MAX(CASE WHEN pho.metric_code = 'blood_glucose' THEN pho.metric_value END) AS "bloodGlucose", MAX(CASE WHEN pho.metric_code = 'insulin_total' THEN pho.metric_value END) AS "insulinTotal", MAX(CASE WHEN pho.metric_code = 'meal_flag' THEN pho.metric_value END) AS "mealFlag", MAX(CASE WHEN pho.metric_code = 'exercise_flag' THEN pho.metric_value END) AS "exerciseFlag" FROM patient_health_observation pho WHERE pho.register_id = #{registerId} GROUP BY pho.observed_at ORDER BY pho.observed_at ASC

SELECT to_char(pho.observed_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS "observedAt", MAX(CASE WHEN pho.metric_code = 'blood_glucose' THEN pho.metric_value END) AS "bloodGlucose", MAX(CASE WHEN pho.metric_code = 'insulin_total' THEN pho.metric_value END) AS "insulinTotal", MAX(CASE WHEN pho.metric_code = 'meal_flag' THEN pho.metric_value END) AS "mealFlag", MAX(CASE WHEN pho.metric_code = 'exercise_flag' THEN pho.metric_value END) AS "exerciseFlag" FROM patient_health_observation pho WHERE pho.register_id = #{registerId} AND pho.source_type = 'patient_report' GROUP BY pho.observed_at ORDER BY pho.observed_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO follow_up_metric_forecast ( register_id, metric_code, forecast_at, forecast_value, confidence, model_id, risk_level ) VALUES ( #{registerId}, #{metricCode}, #{forecastAt}, #{forecastValue}, #{confidence}, #{modelId}, #{riskLevel} ) ON CONFLICT (register_id, metric_code, forecast_at) DO UPDATE SET forecast_value = EXCLUDED.forecast_value, confidence = EXCLUDED.confidence, model_id = EXCLUDED.model_id, risk_level = EXCLUDED.risk_level, creation_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT model_id AS "modelId", risk_level AS "riskLevel", MAX(confidence) AS "confidence", MAX(creation_time) AS "creationTime" FROM follow_up_metric_forecast WHERE register_id = #{registerId} AND metric_code = #{metricCode} GROUP BY model_id, risk_level ORDER BY MAX(creation_time) DESC LIMIT 1
